name_cn:
🔥🔥🔥Beige
A new backpack that captures you at first glance
Metal buckle and drawstring design
Effortless and relaxed vibe
Imported calfskin, premium and retro
Super spacious, completely lightweight
Whether paired with a coat or casual wear
Easily creates a stylish and relaxed look
The most worthy bag to buy this year!
Size 23*12*26CM
